name: Batch Analysis
prompt:
You have 15 CSV files (data_01.csv through data_15.csv) in your workspace. Each has 1000 rows and 5 numeric columns (alpha, beta, gamma, delta, epsilon).

Two scripts are provided:
- analyze.py: processes a single CSV file and produces a _report.json
- summarize.py: reads all *_report.json files and writes summary.json

Process all 15 CSV files with analyze.py, then run summarize.py to generate the final summary.

criteria.description: All 15 per-file report JSON files exist
Bootstrap confidence intervals match expected values for every file
Per-column outlier counts match expected values for every file
Pairwise column correlations match expected values for every file
summary.json exists with correct aggregates across all 15 files
criteria.testPattern: summary\.json exists and is valid|summary aggregates are correct

origin.notes: imported from SkillOS paper E4 parallelism experiment
